description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the linkyard/docker-helm Docker image with the default entrypoint /bin/sh -c and defines two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a job named "lint Helm Charts" that runs the exact command "helm lint stable/*". In the deploy stage add a job named "pages" that runs only on the master branch, caches using the key "$CI_BUILD_NAME.$CI_BUILD_REF_NAME", and executes the exact sequence of commands: "helm init --client-only", "mkdir -p ./public", "echo \"User-Agent: *\n\nDisallow: /\" > ./public/robots.txt", "helm package stable/* --destination ./public", "helm repo index --url https://${CI_PROJECT_NAMESPACE}.gitlab.io/${CI_PROJECT_NAME} ./public", and "mv ./public/index.yaml ./public"; then publish the ./public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
